User.title: User
User.description: User account information including balance, saved banks, and total carbon footprint impact

uid.description: Unique identifier of the user matching their Firebase Auth uid

todayEarnings.description: Estimated earnings for today in USD/TRY

totalBalanceUsd.description: Total balance including asset value in USD

treesSaved.description: Number of trees saved by investments

savedAccounts.description: List of saved bank accounts for withdrawals

Plant.title: Plant
Plant.description: Green solar plant project details in the investment portfolio

name.description: Name of the solar park (e.g., Santral A)

sharePercentage.description: The user's percentage slice/share of this plant

capacityKw.description: The power rating of the plant in kW

status.description: Current operational status of solar array

imageUrl.description: Visual illustration of the installation site

currentGeneration.description: Relative instantaneous generation power in kWh

Withdrawal.title: Withdrawal
Withdrawal.description: A financial transaction representing a withdrawal request initiated by a user

amount.description: The monetary value in TRY to withdraw

/users/{userId}.description: Private user metadata schema mapping personal info and balances

/plants/{plantId}.description: Public read database of solar properties and operational yields

/users/{userId}/withdrawals/{withdrawalI.description: Private list of user specific withdrawals tracking state transitions
